---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new package surface or migration candidate
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the proposed feature.

## Why It Belongs In ReDD

Explain whether this should be:

- public API
- internal runtime component
- experiment-only support code

## Migration Notes

If this is coming from experimental code or an external research branch, describe the
expected config surface, fallback path, and validation plan.
